message:
feat(conformance,nn): add fixture metadata validation and simplify AvgPool2d padding logic

ft-conformance: Introduce FixtureMetadata trait and validate_fixture_metadata()
to reject fixture cases with empty contract_ids or e2e_scenarios before they
reach the test runners. A blanket impl_fixture_metadata! macro covers all 17
tensor case structs, and every run_tensor_*_conformance entry point now calls
the validator at the top of its case loop.

ft-nn: Remove dead over-engineered padding-element counting in AvgPool2d's
count_include_pad=false branch. The old code computed real_h_start, real_h_end,
clamped variants, and a conditional rh — then immediately discarded rh with
`let _ = rh`. Replace the 12-line block with a single comment clarifying that
the materialized patch size is used as the divisor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
